general_feedback: The single change replaces a `@return TODO FILL IN` placeholder on `char2int`/`char2long`/`char2float`/`char2double` (the doc comment is shared by all four implicit conversions) with `the value of `x` widened to the corresponding numeric type`. This is accurate (the conversions widen `Char` to `Int`/`Long`/`Float`/`Double`), concise, consistent with the existing `@param x the `Char` value to convert`, follows Scaladoc conventions (lowercase start, backticks around the code reference), and aligns with the method-level summary 'Language mandated coercions from `Char` to "wider" types.' No changes required.
